ghost_bet_results.note: Model preferred POR TT under at 103.5 and labeled 101.5 thin. Actual validated suppressive environment more strongly than median.
Lean only, but accurate. Minutes dropped to 17 vs projected 25, yet rebound rate remained dangerous. Under survived by hook.

Miss by hook. Projection correctly flagged minutes/rotation volatility. Actual 13 minutes and only 3 rebounds. This should be downgraded from approved-at-3.5 to thin/avoid if price is worse than -130.
Projection direction hit. Pricing concern was correct because -165 reduced EV, but role/minutes read was sharp: 40 minutes and 6 rebounds.

Major miss. Deni played 32 minutes but finished with only 3 rebounds. Rebound share leaked to Camara, Clingan, Robert Williams, and offensive rebounding clusters. Patch needed: POR frontcourt congestion + foul/defensive role drag.
Primary single validated cleanly. Minutes exactly stable at 34. Result exceeded mean by +1.3 rebounds.

diagnostic_findings: Primary Wembanyama center-local rebound model remains strong and should stay priority eligible in similar profiles.
POR team total under was sharper than initially graded. SAS defensive control plus POR 47 three-point attempts created low-efficiency volume and suppressive scoring environment.
Deni Avdija rebound projection failed because POR rebound distribution became frontcourt-fragmented: Camara 8, Clingan 5, Robert Williams 7, Cissoko 4, with Deni only 3.
Robert Williams under was directionally right, but his 7 boards in 17 minutes indicates very high per-minute rebound volatility. Do not over-grade the under as safe next time.
Kornet over 3.5 missed despite clean 13-minute role. Hook miss plus heavy -159 price confirms rule: low-minute bench rebound overs need stronger price and/or 16+ projected minutes.

patch_recommendations.trigger: POR has Avdija + Camara + Clingan + Robert Williams active with 20+ projected minutes for two or more frontcourt rebounders
patch_recommendations.effect: Downgrade Avdija rebound median by 0.8 to 1.3 when frontcourt rebound competition is high.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Bench big projected under 16 minutes with rebound line 3.5 or higher and price worse than -130
patch_recommendations.effect: Move from approved to lean-only unless rebound chances per projected minute exceed elite threshold.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Elimination game with underdog trailing series and expanded rotation appearing in prior games
patch_recommendations.effect: Increase volatility on secondary rebound overs and redistribute 0.5-1.0 boards to hustle wings/bench frontcourt.
